summary: Initialized portfolio monorepo, installed frontend-design skill, created PRD and archive system.
Bootstrapped monorepo, installed frontend-design skill, created PRD/claude rules, implemented responsive spiral landing and backend APIs, verified builds.
Added frontend contact route to match backend module mapping, updated styles/home link, and re-verified frontend/backend builds on Next.js 16.1.6.

Centered consultation form, added hero spotlight lighting (top-down spot + CSS halo + card emissive), shifted spiral distribution top-heavy, improved readability (muted color + line-heights), added 3 new portfolio projects (Cobalt, Perspective Funnels, Workable).
